title: Hiring Medical Officer at Hinduja Healthcare

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at Hinduja Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
Hinduja Healthcare, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Hinduja Healthcare:
Hinduja Healthcare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hinduja Healthcare!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
